mapper.select: SELECT rule_id AS ruleId, user_seq AS userSeq, day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, method_code AS methodCode, generator_code AS generatorCode, set_count AS setCount, analysis_draw_count AS analysisDrawCount, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn FROM generation_rule WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY sort_order, rule_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO generation_rule ( user_seq, day_of_week, method_code, generator_code, set_count, analysis_draw_count, sort_order, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{methodCode}, #{generatorCode}, #{setCount}, #{analysisDrawCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
